# Addresses

Operations related to addresses. Addresses provide standardized address data.

## Operations At A Glance

| Method | Path | Summary | Auth |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `POST` | `/addresses` | Create address. | Public |
| `GET` | `/addresses/{address}` | Get address. | Public |
| `PATCH` | `/addresses/{address}` | Update address. | Public |
